scene:special_quadrilateral_scene.object_description: a quadrilateral with construction marks and measurement labels

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with exactly two keys: "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with exactly one key: "answer".

task:algebraic_angle_value_query.answer_hint: set "answer" to the angle measure as an integer number of degrees

task:segment_length_value_query.answer_hint: set "answer" to the segment length as an integer
